apps.name: Portainer CE
apps.description: Web UI for managing Docker: containers, images, volumes, networks.
apps.compose:
services:
  portainer:
    image: portainer/portainer-ce:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:9000"
    volumes:
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock
      - portainer_data:/data
volumes:
  portainer_data:

apps.name: Uptime Kuma
apps.description: Beautiful self-hosted uptime monitoring with notifications.
apps.compose:
services:
  uptime-kuma:
    image: louislam/uptime-kuma:1
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:3001"
    volumes:
      - kuma_data:/app/data
volumes:
  kuma_data:

apps.name: Grafana
apps.description: Dashboards and visualization for metrics and logs.
apps.compose:
services:
  grafana:
    image: grafana/grafana:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:3000"
    volumes:
      - grafana_data:/var/lib/grafana
volumes:
  grafana_data:

apps.name: Vaultwarden
apps.compose:
services:
  vaultwarden:
    image: vaultwarden/server:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:80"
    volumes:
      - vw_data:/data
volumes:
  vw_data:

apps.name: AdGuard Home
apps.description: Network-wide ad & tracker blocking DNS server.
apps.compose:
services:
  adguard:
    image: adguard/adguardhome:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "53:53/udp"
      - "53:53/tcp"
      - "{{PORT}}:3000"
    volumes:
      - adguard_work:/opt/adguardhome/work
      - adguard_conf:/opt/adguardhome/conf
volumes:
  adguard_work:
  adguard_conf:

apps.name: Jellyfin
apps.description: Free media server for movies, shows and music.
apps.compose:
services:
  jellyfin:
    image: jellyfin/jellyfin:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:8096"
    volumes:
      - jf_config:/config
      - jf_cache:/cache
      - {{MEDIA}}:/media:ro
volumes:
  jf_config:
  jf_cache:

apps.name: Navidrome
apps.description: Modern music server, compatible with Subsonic apps (Amperfy, Substreamer …).
apps.compose:
services:
  navidrome:
    image: deluan/navidrome:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:4533"
    volumes:
      - nd_data:/data
      - {{MUSIC}}:/music:ro
volumes:
  nd_data:

apps.name: Nextcloud
apps.description: Self-hosted files, calendar, contacts and more.
apps.compose:
services:
  db:
    image: mariadb:11
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: helmsman-nc-root
      MYSQL_DATABASE: nextcloud
      MYSQL_USER: nextcloud
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: helmsman-nc
    volumes:
      - nc_db:/var/lib/mysql
  app:
    image: nextcloud:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:80"
    environment:
      MYSQL_HOST: db
      MYSQL_DATABASE: nextcloud
      MYSQL_USER: nextcloud
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: helmsman-nc
    volumes:
      - nc_data:/var/www/html
    depends_on:
      - db
volumes:
  nc_db:
  nc_data:

apps.name: Gitea
apps.compose:
services:
  gitea:
    image: gitea/gitea:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:3000"
      - "{{SSH_PORT}}:22"
    volumes:
      - gitea_data:/data
volumes:
  gitea_data:

apps.name: code-server
apps.description: VS Code in the browser, running on your server.
apps.compose:
services:
  code-server:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/code-server:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      - PASSWORD={{PASSWORD}}
      - TZ=Europe/Berlin
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:8443"
    volumes:
      - cs_config:/config
volumes:
  cs_config:

apps.name: n8n
apps.compose:
services:
  n8n:
    image: docker.n8n.io/n8nio/n8n:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:5678"
    volumes:
      - n8n_data:/home/node/.n8n
volumes:
  n8n_data:

apps.name: Dozzle
apps.description: Realtime log viewer for all your Docker containers.
apps.compose:
services:
  dozzle:
    image: amir20/dozzle:latest
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "{{PORT}}:8080"
    volumes:
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro
